# Highlighted

> Highlighted is an iOS app that lets you capture passages from physical books using your iPhone camera, organise them into a searchable library, and revisit the ideas worth remembering.

## About

Highlighted is made by an independent creator in Slovenia. It has been trusted by 150,000+ readers, rated ★ 4.9 on the App Store, and named App of the Day by Apple four times.

## Key features

- Camera-based text capture: point your camera at any line in a physical book to extract the exact sentence or paragraph
- Searchable library: every highlight is stored under its book with page numbers, notes, tags, and collections
- Revisit system: reminders and Home Screen widgets resurface old highlights at the right moment
- Share and export: generate quote cards or export in bulk to Notion, Obsidian, and more
- Highlighted+: optional premium tier with power features

## App Store

- Platform: iOS
- Price: Free (Highlighted+ is optional)
- Rating: 4.9 / 5
- Link: https://apps.apple.com/app/id1480216009

## Legal

- Privacy Policy: https://usehighlighted.com/privacy
